use myapp;
---
Use(path="myapp")
==========
use myapp.utils;
---
Use(path="myapp.utils")
==========
use myapp.utils.helper;
---
Use(path="myapp.utils.helper")
==========
use myapp.utils.{a, b};
---
Use(path="myapp.utils", names=[a, b])
==========
use myapp.utils.{a, b, self};
---
Use(path="myapp.utils", names=[a, b, self])
==========
use myapp;
fn id() := produce x
---
Use(path="myapp")
Fn(name="id", body=Produce(Variable("x")))
